title: pityrogramma hirsuta
intro: Pityrogramma hirsuta, also known as the Hairy Lip Fern, is a species of fern native to tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Pityrogramma hirsuta include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against bacterial and fungal infections. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and can be found in various herbal remedies, although its use and availability may vary depending on the region and local regulations.
